title: Eternal Oath
description: A Lantern Addon meant for Palladium
body: This Addon is for Palladium, You can scavenge destroyed ships you find in the world to hopefully find a spark of emotion somewhere in the world, You can use them to craft extrordinary items, to grant you immense power. Swear you're eternal oath. This is a palladium addon based off of the dc universe lanterns.You can shoot lasers, create constructs, fly, as well as unique abilities granted by the rings, however keep a eye on your energy.
